    Description
    AdminDashboardActivity
    Represents the screen that can be used to view navigation options.

    ManageEventsActivity
    Represents the screen that can be used to view events.
    ManageEventsActivityTest
    Instrumented test to verify the logic and data of deleting events from the database
    ManageImagesActivity
    Represents the screen that can be used to view event posters.
    ManageImagesActivityTest
    Instrumented test to verify proper UI functionality of image management
    ManageOrganizersActivity
    Represents the screen that can be used to view event and delete event organizers as required by the administrator.
    ManageOrganizersActivityTest
    Unit tests for ManageOrganizersActivity logic.
    ManageProfilesActivity
    Represents the screen that can be used to view profiles.
    ManageProfilesActivityTest
     
    NotificationLogsActivity
    Allows administrators to view all notifications that have been sent out to users.
